profile.name: Nazrul Islam
profile.title: Creative Developer
profile.tagline: I craft digital experiences that live at the intersection of code & art.
profile.bio: Hi, I’m Nazrul Islam 👋 a passionate BCA student at Guru Kashi University with a strong interest in web development, programming, and problem solving. I love turning ideas into real projects using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and C language. I am a quick learner, curious about new technologies, and always improving my skills. My goal is to build modern, responsive, and user-friendly websites while exploring software development in depth. Outside of coding, I enjoy learning new things, exploring tech tools, and growing my knowledge step by step. 🚀

projects.title: Smart Door Unlock System
projects.description: A smart IoT-based door unlock system with mobile control and real-time monitoring.
